name: Double Chocolate Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine and sugar together until smooth.
2. Beat in the eggs and vanilla extract.
3. Stir in the flour, pecans, cocoa, and baking powder until combined.
4. Spread the mixture evenly in a greased 9 x 13 inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with mini marshmallows and bake an additional 3 minutes.
7. Cool completely.
8. In a saucepan, melt the chocolate chips and peanut butter over low heat, stirring until smooth.
9. Stir in the rice cereal until well combined.
10. Spread the melted mixture evenly over the cooled bars.
